zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Gutter於大約1524年出生在英國艾可波金時，他的父親Gutter26歲，母親Gutter23歲。他和Jane至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1589年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Gutter于大约1524年出生在英国艾可波金时，他的父亲Gutter26岁，母亲Gutter23岁。他和Jane至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1589年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Gutter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Benzion, Zvi, Chaim, Hymie, Zalmen.
English: from the Middle English personal name Guthere, from ancient Germanic Gothari or Old English Gūthhere.

variants.name: Guetter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alexandre, Alphonse.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Gutter was born about 1524, in Bocking, Essex, England, his father, Gutter, was 26 and his mother, Gutter, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Jane. He died before 1589, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Gutter est né environ 1524, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Gutter, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Gutter, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Jane. Il est décédé avant 1589, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Gutter um 1524 in Bocking, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gutter 26 und seine Mutter Gutter 23. Er hatte mit Jane mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1589 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Gutter è nato il circa 1524 nel Bocking, Essex, England, il suo padre, Gutter, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Gutter, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Jane. Morì prima del 1589, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Gutterが約1524年にイギリスエセックスボクイングで生まれた時，父Gutterは26歳，母Gutterは23歳であった。彼はJaneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1589年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Gutter(이)가 대략 1524년 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gutter(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Gutter(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Jane(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Gutter nasceu aproximadamente 1524, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gutter, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Gutter, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Jane. Ele faleceu antes 1589, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Gutter родился около 1524 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Gutter было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gutter, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Jane. Он умер перед 1589 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Gutter nació aproximadamente 1524, en Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Gutter, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Gutter, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Jane. Murió antes de 1589, en su pueblo.
